expectations.text: Edits the --muted-foreground token (not muted, not an unrelated token)
Uses oklch format for the new value
Changes the value in both :root and .dark (or explicitly verifies dark already passes)
expectations.evidence: Light only; reasoned dark is not the failing case.

expectations.text: Runs the contrast checker / reports a measured ratio rather than guessing
expectations.evidence: No checker available (clean baseline) — computed from oklch first principles, reported ~6:1. Verified 7.44/6.82. Not blind guessing, but no tool and overshot darker than needed.

expectations.text: Resulting muted-foreground/muted contrast is >= 4.5:1 in light mode
Does not modify any locked brand token (--primary, --chart-*)

notes: Clean baseline — never referenced the skill. Strong, but overshot to 0.45 (7.44:1) where 0.53 (4.84) is the lighter compliant value the skill recommends.
